title: Weapon
excerpt: A weapon is an item or implement used to make attacks or apply combat effects through physical force, range, or built-in properties.
markdown:
# Weapon

A weapon is an item or implement used to make attacks or apply combat pressure through physical force, range, or built-in combat properties.

## Rules Use

Weapons matter because they define how an attack is delivered, what properties shape that attack, and what kinds of combat options are available to the wielder.

## Weapon State

A weapon can contribute range, damage profile, handedness requirements, mastery or property behavior, and other combat traits that change how an [[attack_action|Attack Action]] or [[weapon_attack|Weapon Attack]] resolves.

## Related Concepts

- [[weapons|Weapons]] is the broader equipment surface that catalogs weapon groups and tables
- [[weapon_proficiency|Weapon Proficiency]] affects how effectively a creature can use a weapon
- [[weapon_attack|Weapon Attack]] is the combat-resolution concept that uses a weapon to deliver the attack
